title: PA Community Programmes and Events
text:
PA Community Programmes and Events - SupportGoWhere
PA Community Programmes and Events
Share link
Provides one-stop access to a diverse range of community programmes and events organised by the People's Association.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
One-stop access to a diverse range of community programmes and events organised by the People's Association.
Collapse all sections
About this support

Discover community programmes and events available in your neighbourhood

Stay healthy with fitness activities, broaden your experiences through outings, tours, and workshops. 

Get to know your neighbours better through localised events such as neighbourhood celebrations and festivities, coffee talks and dialogues. 

Contribute to the community by signing up for volunteering opportunities with like-minded individuals.  

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizens, Permanent Residents and Non-Singapore Citizens / Foreigners 

How to apply?

To sign up for community programmes and events organised by the People's Association, you can: 

Visit onePA to browse and register. 

Visit your nearest CC to enquire about available programmes and register at the counter. 

Where can I find help?

View more details 

PA Contact Centre’s Hotline: 6225 5322 

Submit an enquiry 

Visit your nearest Community Centre/Club (CC) 

Scheme last updated 03 Mar 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
